creator: hiroto.kagotani@gmail.com
text:
editors/openoffice.org-3 with LOCALIZED_LANG=ja option has bogus dependency on
japanese font japanese/ipa-ttfonts, which was reorganized recently.

editors/openoffice.org* have the same problem.

How-To-Repeat: # make LOCALIZED_LANG=ja install
..
===>   ja-openoffice.org-3.1.0_1 depends on file: /usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/TrueT
ype/ipam.ttf - not found
===>    Verifying reinstall for /usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/TrueType/ipam.ttf in /usr/ports/japanese/ipa-ttfonts
     => No directory for /usr/local/lib/X11/fonts/TrueType/ipam.ttf.  Skipping..
..
